title: C++ Reimplementation of the ucminf Unconstrained Nonlinear Optimizer
text: Unconstrained nonlinear optimization via modern C++17 Rcpp — complete reimplementation original Fortran-based ucminf R package multi-language support.

title: C++ Reimplementation of the ucminf Unconstrained Nonlinear Optimizer
text: ucminfcpp provides ucminf() function general-purpose unconstrained nonlinear optimization. algorithm quasi-Newton method BFGS updating inverse Hessian soft line search adaptive trust-region radius monitoring. designed drop-replacement original ucminf::ucminf() function. original algorithm written Fortran Hans Bruun Nielsen (IMM, DTU, 2000) described : H.B. Nielsen,“UCMINF — Algorithm Unconstrained, Nonlinear Optimization”, Report IMM-REP-2000-19, DTU, December 2000. Complete Credit: reimplementation based original repositoryhttps://github.com/hdakpo/ucminf. implementation techniques derived original Fortran-based algorithm described : Nielsen, H. B. (2000)UCMINF - Algorithm Unconstrained, Nonlinear Optimization, Report IMM-REP-2000-19, Department Mathematical Modelling, Technical University Denmark.http://www.imm.dtu.dk/documents/ftp/tr00/tr19_00.pdf original Fortran source code located :http://www2.imm.dtu.dk/projects/hbn_software/ucminf.f (archived athttps://web.archive.org/web/20050418082240/http://www.imm.dtu.dk/~hbn/Software/ucminf.f). Dr. Nielsen passed away 2015; code later modified integration R packages. structure R draws FortranCallsR package Diethelm Wuertz.

title: C++ Reimplementation of the ucminf Unconstrained Nonlinear Optimizer
text: Two entry points share optimized kernel.

title: C++ Reimplementation of the ucminf Unconstrained Nonlinear Optimizer
text: Convenient callable type known compile time.
code: #include "ucminf_core.hpp"  ucminf::Result res = ucminf::minimize(     {2.0, 0.5},     [](const std::vector<double>& x,        std::vector<double>& g, double& f) {         double a = 1.0 - x[0], b = x[1] - x[0]*x[0];         f    = a*a + 100.0*b*b;         g[0] = -2.0*a - 400.0*x[0]*b;         g[1] =  200.0*b;     } );

title: C++ Reimplementation of the ucminf Unconstrained Nonlinear Optimizer
text: Zero-overhead template API, inlinable compiler.
code: void rosenbrock(const std::vector<double>& x,                 std::vector<double>& g, double& f) {     /* ... */ }  ucminf::Result res = ucminf::minimize_direct({2.0, 0.5}, rosenbrock);  auto fn = [](const std::vector<double>& x,              std::vector<double>& g, double& f) {     /* ... */ }; ucminf::Result res2 = ucminf::minimize_direct({2.0, 0.5}, fn);

title: C++ Reimplementation of the ucminf Unconstrained Nonlinear Optimizer
text: ucminfcpp::ucminf() called R, every evaluation fn gr crosses interpreter boundary: minimize R callback overhead: Pre-compute invariants outside fn() / gr(). Implement objective C++ call via minimize_direct<F>(). Use Rcpp::cppFunction compiled R code. high-dimensional problems (n ≥ 20), optimized C++ kernels offer larger gains. ``
code: library(microbenchmark) library(ucminf) library(ucminfcpp)  fn <- function(x) (1 - x[1])^2 + 100*(x[2] - x[1]^2)^2 gr <- function(x) c(   -400*x[1]*(x[2]-x[1]^2) - 2*(1-x[1]),    200*(x[2]-x[1]^2) )  microbenchmark(   ucminf    = ucminf::ucminf(c(2, 0.5), fn, gr),   ucminfcpp = ucminfcpp::ucminf(c(2, 0.5), fn, gr),   times = 200 )

title: General-Purpose Unconstrained Non-Linear Optimization (C/Rcpp) — ucminf
text: implementation UCMINF algorithm translated Fortran C wrapped Rcpp. algorithm uses quasi-Newton method BFGS updating inverse Hessian soft line search trust-region radius monitoring.

title: General-Purpose Unconstrained Non-Linear Optimization (C/Rcpp) — ucminf
code: ucminf(   par,   fn = NULL,   gr = NULL,   ...,   fdfun = NULL,   control = list(),   hessian = 0 )

title: General-Purpose Unconstrained Non-Linear Optimization (C/Rcpp) — ucminf
text: par Initial estimate minimum (numeric vector). fn Objective function minimized. Must return scalar. Ignored fdfun supplied. gr Gradient function. NULL finite-difference approximation used. Ignored fdfun supplied. ... Optional arguments passed fn gr. fdfun Optional combined value+gradient function fdfun(x) returning list(f = scalar, g = numeric_vector). supplied, fn gr ignored. control list control parameters (see Details), ucminf_control object. hessian Integer controlling Hessian output: 0 Hessian (default). 2 Returns final inverse-Hessian approximation BFGS. 3 Returns inverse Hessian (2) inverse (Hessian).

title: General-Purpose Unconstrained Non-Linear Optimization (C/Rcpp) — ucminf
text: list class "ucminf" elements: par Computed minimizer. value Objective value minimizer. convergence Termination code: 1 Small gradient (grtol). 2 Small step (xtol). 3 Evaluation limit (maxeval). 4 Zero step line search. -2 n <= 0. -4 stepmax <= 0. -5 grtol xtol <= 0. -6 maxeval <= 0. -7 Given inverse Hessian positive definite. message Human-readable termination message. invhessian.lt Lower triangle final inverse-Hessian   approximation (packed). invhessian Full inverse-Hessian matrix (hessian >= 2). hessian Hessian matrix, inverse invhessian   (hessian == 3). info Named vector: maxgradient \(\|g(x)\|_\infty\) solution. laststep Length last step. stepmax Final trust-region radius. neval Number function/gradient evaluations.

title: General-Purpose Unconstrained Non-Linear Optimization (C/Rcpp) — ucminf
text: package two-phase migration original ucminf R package: Phase 1: Fortran core translated C         (src/ucminf_core.c). Phase 2: C core wrapped Rcpp interface         (src/ucminf_rcpp.cpp). interface designed interchangeable original ucminf::ucminf optim. control argument accepts: trace positive, print convergence info optimization.     Default 0. grtol Stop \(\|g(x)\|_\infty \le\) grtol.     Default 1e-6. xtol Stop \(\|x - x_{\rm prev}\|^2 \le\)     xtol*(xtol + \(\|x\|^2\)). Default 1e-12. stepmax Initial trust-region radius. Default 1. maxeval Maximum function evaluations. Default 500. grad Finite-difference type gr = NULL:     "forward" (default) "central". gradstep Length-2 vector; step     \(|x_i| \cdot \code{gradstep[1]} + \code{gradstep[2]}\).     Default c(1e-6, 1e-8). invhessian.lt vector containing lower triangle     initial inverse Hessian (packed column-major). Default: identity.

title: General-Purpose Unconstrained Non-Linear Optimization (C/Rcpp) — ucminf
text: Nielsen, H. B. (2000). UCMINF – Algorithm Unconstrained, Nonlinear Optimization. Report IMM-REP-2000-19, DTU.

title: General-Purpose Unconstrained Non-Linear Optimization (C/Rcpp) — ucminf
code: ## Rosenbrock Banana function fR <- function(x) (1 - x[1])^2 + 100 * (x[2] - x[1]^2)^2 gR <- function(x) c(-400 * x[1] * (x[2] - x[1] * x[1]) - 2 * (1 - x[1]),                     200 * (x[2] - x[1] * x[1]))  ## Find minimum with analytic gradient ucminf(par = c(2, 0.5), fn = fR, gr = gR) #> ucminf result #>   Converged: Stopped by small gradient (grtol).  #>   Minimum value: 8.073e-20  #>   Minimizer: #> [1] 1 1 #>   Evaluations: 21  #>   Max |gradient|: 1.021e-08   ## Find minimum with finite-difference gradient ucminf(par = c(2, 0.5), fn = fR) #> ucminf result #>   Converged: Stopped by zero step from line search.  #>   Minimum value: 9.007e-08  #>   Minimizer: #> [1] 0.9997 0.9994 #>   Evaluations: 24  #>   Max |gradient|: 8.065e-05

what: Build a validated control list for ucminf() — ucminf_control
title: Build a validated control list for ucminf() — ucminf_control
text: Returns named list control parameters can passed directly ucminf(), ucminf_xptr(), etc.

title: Build a validated control list for ucminf() — ucminf_control
code: ucminf_control(   trace = 0,   grtol = 1e-06,   xtol = 1e-12,   stepmax = 1,   maxeval = 500L,   grad = c("forward", "central"),   gradstep = c(1e-06, 1e-08),   invhessian.lt = NULL )

title: Build a validated control list for ucminf() — ucminf_control
text: trace Integer. > 0, print convergence info. Default 0. grtol Gradient tolerance. Default 1e-6. xtol Step tolerance. Default 1e-12. stepmax Initial trust-region radius. Default 1. maxeval Maximum function evaluations. Default 500. grad Finite-difference type: "forward" "central". Default "forward". gradstep Length-2 step vector. Default c(1e-6, 1e-8). invhessian.lt Packed lower-triangle initial inverse Hessian. Default NULL.

title: Build a validated control list for ucminf() — ucminf_control
text: list class "ucminf_control".

what: Optimize using a compiled C++ objective (XPtr interface) — ucminf_xptr
title: Optimize using a compiled C++ objective (XPtr interface) — ucminf_xptr
text: Calls UCMINF optimizer compiled C++ objective function wrapped Rcpp::XPtr<ucminf::ObjFun>. path bypasses R interpreter every function evaluation, giving maximum performance non-trivial objectives.

title: Optimize using a compiled C++ objective (XPtr interface) — ucminf_xptr
Optimize using a compiled C++ objective (XPtr interface) — ucminf_xptr
text: par Numeric starting vector. xptr externalptr created wrapping ucminf::ObjFun* Rcpp::XPtr<ucminf::ObjFun>. control named list control parameters (see ucminf), ucminf_control object. hessian Integer: 0 = none, 2 = inv-Hessian, 3 = .
